item.text: {"id":"urn:molaug-v0:material","verdict":"ACCEPT","gloss_scholarly":true,"explication_carries_gloss":true,"self_flag_correct":true,"sense_collision_free":true,"reason":"The rendering identifies a material kind shared by all parts of a thing and acted on by its maker during making, while accurately flagging unencoded substance continuity and persistence as lossy."}
